overrideReason: Jul 12: Iran's IRGC declared the strait closed 'until further notice' after attacks on commercial shipping; Washington disputes it and reports escorted transits continuing. Verified transit data lags several days behind.

reportedTransits.source: Windward Maritime Intelligence (12 outbound, 9 inbound) via press reports

OPEN: Open. The insurers remain unconvinced, but open.
Open, in the same way it has been 'open' since 1959: with caveats.
Ships are moving and everyone is being extremely casual about it.
Yes. The paperwork says yes, the water says yes, even the spokespeople say yes. Enjoy it.
Yes, empirically. A tanker went in and, crucially, came back out.
Yes. Do not ask a follow-up question.
Open. The font size overstates our confidence.
